steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank contains a noun phrase in which Mark A. Lee is in apposition to researcher — it identifies which specific researcher led the study. The question tests how to punctuate this appositive.

steps.title: Apply the appositive rule
steps.content: When an appositive is restrictive (essential to identify the noun), it requires no commas: researcher Mark A. Lee is correct. Choices A and D lack periods after initials, and Choice B misplaces a comma after the name. That matches choice C — C is correct.
